title: geranium molle var. villosum
intro: Geranium molle var. villosum is a variety of the Geranium molle plant, a flowering perennial native to the Mediterranean region, known for its distinctive hairy leaves and stems. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are said to help with wound healing, reducing pain and inflammation, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The health benefits of Geranium molle var. villosum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, regulate menstrual cycles, and provide relief from stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Geranium molle var. villosum can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
